name: @metorial/formsite
description: Retrieve form definitions, field structures, and submission results from Formsite online forms and surveys. List all forms and their status, get item/field definitions for labeling, and search, filter, sort, and paginate through form submission data. Manage webhooks for real-time notifications when results are completed. Read-only access to form data — cannot create, edit, or delete submissions.
skills: filter results by date or ID
